title: Spring Cloud Config Environment
description: JSON Schema for the Spring Cloud Config Server environment response object returned by /{application}/{profile}.

label.description: Label (branch, tag, or commit hash) from the backing repository

version.description: Git commit hash or version identifier

propertySources.description: Ordered list of property sources contributing to this environment

name.description: Identifier of the property source (e.g., git URL + path)

source.description: Key-value configuration properties from this source
